name: ThredUp Inc.
business: ThredUp operates one of the world's largest online resale platforms for apparel, shoes and accessories. It generates revenue primarily from items sold to buyers on its website and mobile app, as well as bag fees charged to sellers. It also offers a Resale-as-a-Service (RaaS) offering to brands and retailers.

exposures.sentence: Our facilities run on a suite of our custom-built applications designed for single SKU operations. Our engineering team has implemented large-scale, innovative and patented automation for put-away, storage, picking and packing at scale.

ThredUp’s data science portfolio leverages machine learning algorithms, predictive analytics, and other artificial intelligence AI technologies to identify trends, anomalies and correlations, provide alerts and initiate business processes.
